title: Erucastrum armoracioides

The species Erucastrum armoracioides is also known as wild rocket, and is closely related to the cultivated rocket (Eruca sativa). The classification of Erucastrum armoracioides reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Brassicaceae family.
